title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.
status_summary: Closed the final Stakeholder Briefing V1 artifact-contract review. Added source-safe entry IDs hashed from the full person/kind/source/signal anchor tuple and earliest-qualifying lineage for deterministic multi-observation rollups, with explicit remint/orphan/successor behavior. Resolved all review minors and nits: commit-time index status versus live freshness, explicitly_outstanding review state, eligible signal-file definition, provider-contract dependency, meeting acquisition requirements, signal-set fingerprinting, Recent Changes behavior, collision ordering, response valence guidance, and derivation trigger enums. Reconciled implementation plan, product status, current questions, context primer, and README; removed generated egg-info. Verification: 133 tests pass, 28 JSON examples parse, Markdown fences balance, and git diff check passes.
next_actions: Commit the frozen design-and-contract checkpoint. Next, freeze the effective-date override/repair contract, add sanitized July 10/13 Teams VTT fixtures, and implement occurrence reliability before Layer 5A schema and identity work.
